title: andrachne orbicularis
intro: Andrachne orbicularis, also known as the Indian mercury plant, is a perennial plant native to India and other parts of Asia, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and oval-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Andrachne orbicularis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
